osm_tags.description: We are a group of highly trained psychotherapists and psychologists who provide counseling and psychological services.
osm_tags.name: Lotus Counseling

name: David Ettinger, LCSW - Therapist in Miami Aventura Florida

osm_tags.description: David Ettinger, LCSW specializes in anxiety disorders, post-traumatic stress (PTSD/Trauma), and emotion regulation issues. His therapeutic approach is heavily based on neuroscience research.
osm_tags.name: David Ettinger, LCSW - Therapist in Miami Aventura Florida
osm_tags.opening_hours: Mon to Fri: 10 am-9 pm || Sat & Sun : 24 hours
